violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Towels soaked in grease left under deep fryers can cause hazard.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Hot hold filets, etc not cleaned as often as needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Cooking area and sitting area not cleaned as frequent as needed.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
